_readme: Claude appends an entry here whenever deck data or app behavior changes (newest first). Shown verbose in the settings footer, but ONLY for the JST account. Keep summaries short; details are 1-line bullets.

entries.summary: Card-back POS colours now read as one coherent legend
details: Moves the complete POS legend directly beneath the word and lemma, removing repeated section introductions while preserving POS-grouped scrolling
Every sense row now carries a restrained POS tint; the selected row is distinguished by stronger colour, border, left rail, and elevation
Removes the redundant matched and matched-example pills while retaining the colour link between an assigned sense and its example
Labels MWE content as Expressions and gives clitics their own legend colour; cache v64→v65, assets 20260724i→20260724j

entries.summary: Frequency scrubber now has useful head-to-tail resolution
details: Corrected measurements show 44–59% of current artist decks remain in the 1–3 occurrence/example tail, so the deck now uses ten near-equal-card bands with nearby frequency-cliff snapping
Cuts inside a tied low-frequency tier are explicitly labelled with frequency and cumulative card count (for example 2× · 3.2k), replacing indistinguishable repeated ≥2 stops
Lemma bands and coverage use pooled unique-example frequency; form bands use corpus frequency, and smart selections keep that display-rank basis through setup, next-level navigation, and deck loading
Percentage-mode form decks are explicitly frequency-sorted (the Young Miko source had 83 upward jumps); source rank remains the stable ID/tie-breaker; cache v63→v64, assets 20260724h→20260724i

entries.summary: Lemma frequency now matches its pooled example lines
details: Audit confirmed gasté/gastar showed 41 raw tokens while pooling 28 unique lines and retaining only 25; the cap is removed and the card front now uses the same unique-line pool (28)
Multi-artist senses now merge by stable master-sense index instead of shortened-array position, preventing wrong/missing sense examples across 1,878 divergent shared IDs

Multi-artist unions now recompute one representative per lemma (the old per-artist flags left 700 lemmas with duplicate cards), tag artist provenance, dedupe lines, and share the same merged data between setup ranges and the deck
Raw token totals remain available as lemma_total_count for diagnostics; cache v62→v63, assets 20260724g→20260724h

entries.summary: Standard-mode progress now lives inside the language box
details: After choosing a language, its name sits beside the compact speech/flashcard percentages and the coverage bar runs directly underneath in the same step-1 card
Zero-progress languages keep the chosen language visible while the estimate CTA remains separate; artist mode's top progress card is unchanged; cache v61→v62, assets 20260724f→20260724g

entries.summary: Standard mode now chooses languages from a radial flag clock
details: The row of language tabs is replaced by one clear Choose a language button that opens flag pictures around the same radial picker used for artists
Available languages retain their existing loading behavior and coming-soon languages remain visible but disabled; cache v60→v61, assets 20260724e→20260724f

entries.summary: Matched senses and examples now share a clear visual cue
details: The selected sense uses its POS colour as a soft tint and left rail; genuinely assigned senses add a compact ✓ matched chip, while unassigned senses remain selected without a false confidence claim
Assigned examples repeat the same POS-colour rail/tint with a ✓ matched example chip, replacing the cold full outline; cache v59→v60, assets 20260724d→20260724e

entries.summary: Card-back senses are now organised into POS sections
details: Each part of speech gets one labelled header above its senses instead of repeating a POS pill inside every row; long cards keep all sections in the existing scroll area
Duplicate translation/context groups now stay within one POS section, while MWE and clitic sections remain in the pinned tray; cache v58→v59, assets 20260724c→20260724d

entries.summary: Examples now highlight words required by a Spanish sense
details: When a sense says it is used with "X", whole-word occurrences of X receive the same example highlight as the headword, with no token whitelist
The parsed companion is retained as meaning.usedWith for later UI work; cache v57→v58, assets 20260724b→20260724c

entries.summary: The setup screen now pulses the step that needs your attention
details: The numbered badge advances from language to level to set selection in standard mode; artist mode begins at level because its language is fixed
The slow pulse becomes a static focus ring when reduced motion is enabled; cache v56→v57, assets 20260724a→20260724b

entries.summary: Artist-mode 'Choose level' help now keeps the Lemma & Cognates tabs
details: In artist mode the level help tooltip was overwriting its whole body with a single lyrics-coverage paragraph, deleting the Lemma and Cognates explanation tabs; now it only swaps the Level tab's text and keeps all three tabs

entries.summary: Setup tweaks: 'Collapse Lemmas On/Off', shorter Cognates labels, brighter in-study progress bar
details: 'Cards per Lemma' toggle renamed to 'Collapse Lemmas' with On/Off (On = one card per lemma); Lemma help tab updated to match
Cognates toggle no longer expands to 'Exclude cognates'/'Include cognates' when selected — stays 'Exclude'/'Include'
In-study deck progress bar brightened (accent tint toward white + soft glow, thicker track) so it's clearer how far through a set you are

entries.summary: Level scrubber readout reworded + frequency labels now always decrease
details: Headline now reads 'Most common 62 words' instead of 'Top 62 cards'
Frequency shown as a plain sentence — 'Words appearing at least 31 times in the lyrics' — instead of the '≥ 31 / in lyrics' two-liner (per-million-words phrasing in normal mode)
Example words for the level now sit on their own line beneath the frequency sentence, centred
Fixed scrambled/non-decreasing segment numbers: labels are now the frequency threshold itself (strictly decreasing, exactly truthful) and counted linearly so rank/count sort noise can't break them
Changing lemma-per-card or cognate inclusion now keeps the scrubber on the nearest segment instead of jumping to the far right, and the set options refresh for the new selection

entries.summary: Level scrubber fixes: no duplicate numbers, sets reset on level change, frequency-tier splits
details: Fixed the leftover small-font tick numbers under the scrubber (the hide rule lost a CSS specificity tie to the base ticks rule) — only the large centred labels show now

Tapping/scrubbing to a new level now reliably resets the Choose-Set options (added a scrollend commit + tap-to-commit; before, a segment tap magnified the level but never re-rendered the ranges, so you couldn't pick sets above the old level)
Level segments now split by frequency tiers (distinct 'appears ≥N times' bands) instead of 10 equal-card-count chunks — no more several segments all labelled ≥2

entries.summary: Flag a specific sense pairing (not just the whole word), with ↑/↓ sense nav
details: Flag (F key) now opens a sense-level flag menu: pick which word→meaning pairing is wrong, choose an issue type (wrong meaning / lemma / example / whole word), then submit
↑/↓ move through the card's senses while flagging (Enter submits, Esc cancels); the card behind the menu syncs to the highlighted sense via selectMeaning

FlaggedWords payload is backward-compatible: sense flags add a field path (sense:i / example:i / lemma) + gloss text so the row is human-resolvable; whole-word flags send the identical payload as before — no sheet columns reordered. Offline flags still route through the sync queue

entries.summary: Offline support: study offline, progress/flags queue and sync when back online
details: Service worker now serves deck DATA from cache offline (index/examples/master/config/rank/conjugation JSON) via stale-while-revalidate; added an offline navigation fallback so deep-links like ?artist=bad-bunny still boot with no network

New js/sync-queue.js: answers & flags made offline are saved to a durable localStorage queue, de-duped (latest state per word wins), and flushed to Google Sheets in order on reconnect + a 20s retry timer; partial-flush safe (unsent tail re-queued)

Online path unchanged (still write-through, same latency); progress cache now updated on every answer so an offline reload keeps your counts; reconnect reloads overlay un-synced writes so nothing regresses
New top-bar status pill shows 'Offline' / 'Syncing N…', clearing when synced. Cache v50→v51, assets 20260722c→20260722d

entries.summary: Bad Bunny deck rebuilt (v2): sense re-classification + clitic/lemma fixes
details: Full pipeline rerun with the new classify-or-propose sense-matching on gemini-3.1-flash-lite — fixes April sense errors (media→half) and emits a slang review queue
fue/fui/fuiste now split ser vs ir ('went'/'left'); ya (+726), sé→saber, una→uno recovered; clitic forms folded into their base-verb cards
Contractions normalized ('tamos→estamos); SpanishDict fuzzy headwords rejected (perse→purse); your study progress + all 258 curations preserved
Deck kept lean (synonyms/antonyms dropped, ~1.6MB). Cache v49→v50

entries.summary: Level picker is now a horizontal scrubber
details: The crammed level/frequency-band selector on the setup page is now a horizontal scroll-snap 'ruler' — swipe/drag left-right and the centered, magnified segment is your level
Declutters the old all-segments-at-once bar into a focused, zoomed scrub; reuses the existing level-selection plumbing so ranges/sets behave the same
Front-end only. Cache bumped 20260722c / v49

entries.summary: Lyrics mode: artist picker is now a radial "clock of pictures"
details: Tapping the top-bar Lyrics Mode button opens a full-screen radial picker: each artist is a round album-art thumbnail arranged evenly around a circle (N artists space out automatically)
Artist image resolves from artists.json (pickerImage/image/defaultAlbumArt); if none exists it falls back to an accent-colored disc with the artist's initials (e.g. Young Miko)
Tap a thumbnail to switch into that artist; tap the center hub, the backdrop, or press Escape to close. Theme-aware and phone-width responsive
First-pass component, expect to iterate on sizing/styling

entries.summary: Card-back polish: readable lemma, clearer selected sense, restyled Deck Complete popup
details: Card-back lemma now uses a brightened accent tint (color-mix + shadow) so it reads clearly against the dark back instead of the low-contrast raw accent red
Selected sense row now gets a left accent bar + soft accent glow (on top of the existing tint/border) so the active meaning is obvious across all row types, including unassigned and grouped rows

Deck Complete popup restyled to match the app's modal aesthetic: centered header with icon + accuracy pill, cleaner stat tiles with labels, and on-theme accent-primary primary button (was off-theme blue)

entries.summary: Lemma mode: deck now ordered by pooled lemma frequency
details: One-card-per-lemma now sums each lemma's frequency across all its collapsed forms (es + son + eres + soy… → ser), matching the example pooling
Deck order reflects that total, so the most common lemmas come first: ser rises to 3,666 (rep 'es' alone was 1,284), ir to 1,536; verbs spread across rare forms surface by true frequency
The 'Frequency: N' on a lemma card now shows the pooled total. Front-end only, no rebuild

entries.summary: Bad Bunny deck rebuilt: common-word meanings fixed + 1,385 missing words recovered
details: Top homograph cards fixed: para = 'for' (was 'to stop'), como = 'like' (was 'to eat'), todo = 'everything', cara = 'face', camino = 'road'
1,385 words that showed no card are back: las, dime, otra, así, bebé, nada, hay, calle, rico, ustedes…
Curated cognates now hidden (baby, flow, haters…); sense frequencies re-aligned to the current master; your study progress + all curations preserved
Still to come (separate step): April sense-classification errors like media='sock' need a Gemini re-run; synonyms/antonyms panels left off to keep the deck lean

entries.summary: Example lines: cards now lead with a clear, well-sized sentence
details: Fixed the picker that showed the longest lyric line ~80% of the time — 'nunca' used to open with a 71-word spoken monologue; now a 10-word line
Prefers a 6–14 word window, demotes lines with no English translation, caps deck-word overlap so length no longer wins; recently-missed words still boosted
Front-end only, no deck rebuild. Cache bumped 20260721a / v44

entries.summary: Your FlaggedWords processed: 27 live-deck cards fixed
details: PR slang glosses: palomo=sucker, galla=hot girl, sata=vixen, coro=crew, corta=gun (all 4 senses), pepas=pill, bajita=on the low, perse=chase/heat, fuletazo=gunshot, pacho hidden as ad-lib
Lemma repairs: to's=todos (was tos/cough), toitas=todita (was torta/cake), pasandola=pasar (was parar), revelas=rebelarse (official transl. 'Rebellious'), galla, sata, corta, fuletazo
Duplicate/wrong senses blanked: vengan (to come x3), volver (to turn x2, no examples), recoge, compre, tabla (surfboard), viene (next), todos, ven (ver card glossed 'come')
Re-glossed: falta (hacer falta senses), jodios pos VERB->ADJ, polo sense1=pole, tropiezo sense0=noun, chorro=a bunch of
6 of your flags (des, okay, panty, down, light, whatsapp) were already fixed in the May sweeps; verdes/versatil/levante checked out correct on inspection
Deck fully green on the bench again (only known menu_bloat 25 remains, dies at wikt cutover)

entries.summary: Lemma mode now pools examples from all forms of the lemma
details: One-card-per-lemma cards now show lyric/example lines from every collapsed form (quiero + quieres + quiere ... on the querer card)
Sibling examples attach to the matching sense (same translation), deduped by sentence, capped at 25/sense; each carries pooledFrom for future UI
Works in normal, single-artist, and multi-artist modes; no data rebuild needed (front-end only, cache tags bumped to 20260713a)

entries.summary: Wiktionary port Phase 0 report + 6 bug cards fixed
details: Coverage report: 96% of visible BB cards have Wiktionary senses; all 24 menu-bloat cases dissolve
Fixed: sea='mar'→ser, vine='vid'→venir, mire, 'tás='bench block'→estás, mía='to miaow'→mine, besos='collision'→kiss
Conjugations rebuilt with repaired lemmas (frontear, josear, ... now have tables + tags)

entries.summary: verbose_def 110->0: all sentence-glosses shortened; deck fully green
details: ~80 Gemini sentence-definitions cut to flashcard glosses (bellaquita, tiguere, pikete, rulay, ...)
Gems: roles=Rolex, pos/po'=por, opo=cut-off 'oportunidad', pre=pre-game, nano=bro
Hidden: strippers/men (EN), laramercy (gang), diesel/safari/portobello/pose/amén (cognates), auch/ea/wuff (interjections)
Every bench class now 0 except menu_bloat (25, needs sense-pipeline rework)

entries.summary: Blank rows filled, verb morph tags on artist cards, shorter examples first
details: 36 blank-gloss senses filled (dar, saber a, caer, volver a, se impersonal, …)
Artist verb cards now show tense/person tags (was 0% coverage; e.g. vi = preterite 1sg)
Normal-mode examples reordered: short sentences display first (no data lost)
eramos→ser fixed; barea/let's hidden; conjugation build extended to artist lemmas (rerun pending)
20 slang verb lemmas repaired (frontear ×6, perrear, josear, 'tas→estar…); Tatís/Play/do/lego hidden

entries.summary: Freshness footer + fetch tracking on all load paths
details: Settings footer shows data Last-Modified + fetch time (this panel)
Multi-artist merge + CSV paths now tracked too
Cache bumped to v38 to force fresh data

entries.summary: Detector sweep: 78 junk cards hidden, 25 glosses fixed (no rerun)
details: 'tán' now = "are (short for 'están')" — was 9 suntan senses from English 'tan'
Hidden: rob/'syrup', vegas/'meadow', carmen/'poem', so, too, game, cash, +70 more
Fixed: media='half', manín='bro', mera='hey!', cuki='cutie'
2 new bench detectors (verbatim-EN, mid-line caps) now guard regressions
